calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights
Off Calendar Jan-10-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. KIMBERLY POMERANTZ, Esq. of G&B Law, LLP (Tel: 818-382-6200) for petitioner J.G. Wentworth Originations, LLC;
Also present: Payee TE'JON MOODY.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS, LLC's Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights.

Court discusses the terms of the transfer with the payee and counsel for petitioner.

The Court rules as follows: Petitioner's petition for approval for transfer of payment rights is GRANTED.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
